name: Google
tagline: Search, Workspace & Cloud Engineering at planetary scale
description: Google's engineering teams build products used by 4 billion people. Web engineers work on Search, Maps, Workspace, and Chrome.

name: Meta
tagline: Social platforms & immersive experiences for billions
description: Meta engineers build Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp and the metaverse. Open-source pioneers of React, GraphQL, and more.

name: Netflix
tagline: Streaming infrastructure & user experience at global scale
description: Netflix's engineering team builds the systems delivering 250+ million streams daily. Known for chaos engineering and microservices.

name: Shopify
tagline: Commerce platform powering millions of merchants worldwide
description: Shopify enables entrepreneurs to build businesses. Engineering teams build e-commerce tools, payments infrastructure, and merchant APIs.

name: Airbnb
tagline: Travel marketplace connecting hosts and guests globally
description: Airbnb builds trust-driven marketplace experiences. Their engineering team pioneered React Native and many open-source tools.

name: Stripe
tagline: Financial infrastructure for the internet economy
description: Stripe processes hundreds of billions in payments. Their API-first culture demands extreme reliability, security, and developer experience.

name: Vercel
tagline: Edge-first deployment platform for frontend developers
description: Vercel builds the infrastructure layer for the modern web — serverless, edge functions, and the home of Next.js.

name: GitHub
tagline: Developer platform where the world builds software
description: GitHub is where 100M+ developers collaborate. Engineering teams build the version control, CI/CD, and collaboration tools used by everyone.

name: Google DeepMind
tagline: World-class AI research with real-world data impact
description: DeepMind's data science teams analyze research outcomes, model performance metrics, and deploy large-scale data pipelines for AI systems.

name: Netflix
tagline: Data-driven decisions powering entertainment for 270M subscribers
description: Netflix's data science team builds recommendation systems, content valuation models, and A/B testing infrastructure at massive scale.

name: Uber
tagline: Real-time data science for mobility and delivery at scale
description: Uber processes petabytes of trip, driver, and pricing data daily. Data scientists build pricing models, fraud detection, and demand forecasting.

name: Spotify
tagline: Music discovery powered by world-class data science
description: Spotify's data scientists build Discover Weekly, podcast recommendations, and personalization systems for 600M+ users.

name: Microsoft
tagline: Data intelligence across Azure, Office, and LinkedIn
description: Microsoft's data science spans Azure AI, Office 365 analytics, LinkedIn's economic graph, and Xbox player insights.

name: IBM
tagline: Enterprise AI and data analytics at global scale
description: IBM's data science teams build Watson AI products, data governance tools, and enterprise analytics solutions for Fortune 500 clients.

name: OpenAI
tagline: Building safe artificial general intelligence for humanity
description: OpenAI creates GPT, DALL-E, and Whisper. ML engineers work on pre-training, fine-tuning, RLHF, and productionizing frontier models.

name: Anthropic
tagline: AI safety and reliable, interpretable AI systems
description: Anthropic builds Claude and researches AI safety, interpretability, and Constitutional AI. Rigorous scientific approach to AI development.

name: Hugging Face
tagline: The open-source home of machine learning models
description: Hugging Face hosts 400K+ ML models and builds the Transformers, Diffusers, and Datasets libraries used by millions of researchers.

name: NVIDIA
tagline: GPU computing and AI infrastructure powering the AI revolution
description: NVIDIA builds the GPUs and CUDA stack underpinning all AI training. AI teams build NeMo, TensorRT, and CUDA ML libraries.

name: Tesla AI
tagline: Real-world AI for autonomous driving at scale
description: Tesla's AI team builds Autopilot and FSD using neural networks trained on billions of miles of real-world driving data.

name: Meta AI
tagline: Open AI research from LLaMA to PyTorch to Segment Anything
description: Meta AI Research (FAIR) is behind LLaMA, PyTorch, Segment Anything, and OPT. One of the most prolific open-source AI teams.

name: Google
tagline: Android, Flutter, and Maps SDKs for billions of devices
description: Google's mobile teams build Android OS, Flutter, Google Maps, and YouTube Mobile — products on 3 billion Android devices.

name: Uber
tagline: Real-time mobility apps for drivers and riders worldwide
description: Uber's mobile engineering built RIBs architecture and Needle DI framework. Both iOS and Android apps handle real-time geolocation at scale.

name: Spotify
tagline: Music streaming app engineering for iOS and Android
description: Spotify's mobile apps stream audio to 600M+ users. Engineering challenges include low-latency audio, offline mode, and cross-platform sync.

name: Meta (Instagram)
tagline: Photo, video, and Reels for 2 billion Instagram users
description: Instagram's mobile teams ship features to billions of users daily. Pioneers of React Native, Litho (Android), and ComponentKit (iOS).

name: Duolingo
tagline: Language learning gamification on iOS and Android
description: Duolingo's mobile-first approach has 500M+ learners. Mobile teams build gamification, spaced repetition, and AI-driven lesson systems.

name: Airbnb
tagline: Travel marketplace experiences on iOS and Android
description: Airbnb pioneered React Native and Lottie animations. Mobile teams build host tools, booking flows, and messaging for travelers worldwide.

name: Discord
tagline: Real-time voice, video, and chat for gaming communities
description: Discord's mobile apps handle real-time voice and video for 200M+ users. Engineering challenges include WebRTC, low-latency audio, and server lists.

name: Amazon AWS
tagline: The world's leading cloud — infrastructure for everyone
description: AWS powers 33% of the internet. Platform engineers build services like EC2, EKS, Lambda, and the 200+ AWS services used globally.

name: HashiCorp
tagline: Infrastructure automation with Terraform, Vault, and Consul
description: HashiCorp builds the tools that define modern infrastructure automation. Engineers build Terraform providers, Vault secrets, and Nomad scheduler.

name: Cloudflare
tagline: Global network security and edge computing platform
description: Cloudflare operates one of the world's largest networks. Engineers build Workers, R2, DNS, DDoS protection, and Zero Trust products.

name: Datadog
tagline: Cloud monitoring, APM, and observability at scale
description: Datadog monitors 25,000+ companies' infrastructure. Engineering teams build the Agent, APM tracing, log management, and alerting systems.

name: Grafana Labs
tagline: Open observability — metrics, logs, traces unified
description: Grafana Labs builds the de-facto standard for open-source observability: Grafana dashboards, Loki for logs, Tempo for traces, and Mimir for metrics.

name: GitLab
tagline: Complete DevSecOps platform — one application for the whole lifecycle
description: GitLab is an all-remote company building the only true DevSecOps platform with CI/CD, security scanning, and Kubernetes deployments built-in.

name: CrowdStrike
tagline: Cloud-native endpoint protection and threat intelligence
description: CrowdStrike's Falcon platform detects threats on 2,000+ customers. Engineers build kernel-level agents, threat detection ML models, and response automation.

name: Palo Alto Networks
tagline: Next-gen firewall and AI-powered cybersecurity platform
description: Palo Alto Networks secures 85K+ organizations. Engineers build NGFW, SASE, Cortex XDR, and Prisma Cloud security products.

name: Okta
tagline: Identity and access management for the cloud era
description: Okta manages identity for 18,000+ organizations. Engineers build SSO, MFA, OAuth2/OIDC flows, and Zero Trust identity policies.

name: SentinelOne
tagline: AI-powered autonomous cybersecurity endpoint protection
description: SentinelOne's Singularity platform uses AI to autonomously detect and respond to threats in real-time without human intervention.

name: Cloudflare Security
tagline: DDoS protection, Zero Trust, and network security at global scale
description: Cloudflare's security products protect 20% of the web. Engineers build DDoS mitigation, WAF rules, bot management, and Zero Trust Access.

name: Splunk
tagline: Security analytics and SIEM for enterprise threat detection
description: Splunk's SIEM processes petabytes of security logs for 15,000+ enterprise customers. Engineers build detection rules, log pipelines, and correlation engines.

name: Snyk
tagline: Developer-first security — find and fix vulnerabilities in code
description: Snyk integrates into developer workflows to detect CVEs in dependencies, containers, IaC, and code. Used by 2,000+ engineering teams.

name: IBM Security
tagline: QRadar SIEM and enterprise security intelligence platform
description: IBM Security builds QRadar, Guardium, and Verify products used by Fortune 500 companies for threat detection and compliance.
